[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Roshton''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an officer in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Approximately one year after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], Roshton was assigned to accompany one of [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] advisors, [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]], to [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]]. Their mission was to secure the assistance of [[Spaarti Creations]] for the manufacture of modern [[Spaarti cloning cylinder]]s. The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] soon discovered the plan and launched an attack on Cartao.

Roshton had been given orders to defend Spaarti Creations from being captured and to ensure the continued production of the Spaarti cloning cylinder, but he soon realized that the two orders contradicted each other. If his troops engaged the enemy, the manufacturing facility would probably be damaged, but if they didn't fight, the facility would easily be captured by the Separatists. He commanded only nine hundred [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], while the Separatists had five thousand [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and their accompanying [[Multi-Troop Transport/Legends|MTT]] large-transport vehicles, [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|AAT]] battle tanks, and hundreds of [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAPs]].

Despite the damage the fire-fight might cause, Roshton decided to have his troops hide inside the facility for cover. After meeting [[Jafer Torles]], Cartao's [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Guardian, Roshton decided he needed a new strategy that would prevent serious damage to the facility. He ordered his troops to move into the tunnels that led away from the main plant and establish positions from which they could harass the rear flanks of the Separatist forces across the neighboring city and forest area.

Roshton, in the guise of a landscaper, planted remote-activated landmines around the grounds. His plans were going well until Separatist forces collapsed the exits to an access tunnel, trapping his troops within. While Kinman Doriana, Jafer Torles and Republic Lieutenant [[Laytron]] launched a daring rescue mission which freed Roshton and his remaining troopers, a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|Republic gunship]] destroyed the entire facility, supposedly under the orders of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]].
